description: Immerse yourself in the breathtaking landscapes and rich culture of Switzerland, a paradise for fans of 'Crash Landing on You'. This 7-day journey will take you through charming towns, stunning mountains, and serene lakes, all while indulging in local delicacies and finding unique fan merchandise. Get ready to create unforgettable memories with your family as you explore the heart of Swiss culture and history, all while enjoying the relaxed yet vibrant atmosphere that this beautiful country has to offer.

days.title: Arrival in Zurich and Exploring the City

activities.description: Start your day with a delightful breakfast at Café Sprüngli, famous for its luxurious pastries and rich hot chocolate. Enjoy a traditional Swiss breakfast in a charming atmosphere.

Wander through the picturesque streets of Zurich Old Town, where medieval buildings and vibrant shops create a unique atmosphere. Don't miss the iconic Grossmünster church and the beautiful views from its towers.

Enjoy a hearty Swiss lunch at Zeughauskeller, a historic restaurant known for its traditional dishes like Zürcher Geschnetzeltes (sliced veal) and delicious sausages. The rustic ambiance adds to the experience.
Take a leisurely stroll along the shores of Lake Zurich. The serene views and fresh air make it a perfect spot to relax. You can also opt for a short boat ride to enjoy the scenery from the water.

activities.activity: Shopping for Crash Landing on You Merchandise
activities.description: Head to the local shops and boutiques to find exclusive Crash Landing on You merchandise. Look for themed items that will make great souvenirs for fans of the show.
Indulge in a traditional Swiss dinner at Restaurant Swiss Chuchi, where you can savor authentic fondue and raclette in a cozy setting. A perfect way to end your first day in Zurich!
Conclude your day with a peaceful evening walk in Lindenhof Park. This historic site offers stunning views of the city and is a lovely spot to relax and reflect on your day.

days.title: Day Trip to Lucerne and Mount Pilatus

transit.memo: Enjoy the scenic train ride from Zurich to Lucerne.

activities.description: Stroll through the charming streets of Lucerne's Old Town, where you can admire the beautiful frescoed buildings and the iconic Chapel Bridge. Don't forget to take some photos with the stunning backdrop of the Swiss Alps!
Savor traditional Swiss cuisine at Restaurant Fritschi, known for its cozy atmosphere and delicious fondue. A perfect way to recharge before heading to Mount Pilatus!

activities.activity: Take the Boat to Mount Pilatus
activities.description: Board a scenic boat ride on Lake Lucerne to reach the base of Mount Pilatus. Enjoy breathtaking views of the lake and mountains during the journey!

activities.activity: Ride the Cogwheel Train to Mount Pilatus
activities.description: Experience the world's steepest cogwheel railway as you ascend to the summit of Mount Pilatus. The panoramic views from the top are absolutely stunning!
At the summit, take your time to explore the various walking trails and enjoy the breathtaking views of the surrounding mountains and valleys. This is a great spot for family photos!
Take the aerial cableway down from Mount Pilatus, offering a different perspective of the stunning landscape. It's a thrilling ride that the whole family will enjoy!
End your day with a hearty dinner at Wirtshaus Galliker, a local favorite known for its authentic Swiss dishes and warm hospitality. A perfect way to unwind after a day of exploration!
Take the train back to Zurich, reflecting on the wonderful day spent in Lucerne and Mount Pilatus. The train ride is a great time to relax and enjoy the scenery one last time.

days.title: Journey to Interlaken and Adventure Activities

transit.memo: Enjoy the scenic train ride through the Swiss countryside.

activities.description: Take the funicular to Harder Kulm for breathtaking views of Interlaken and the surrounding mountains. It's a perfect spot for family photos and to soak in the beauty of the Swiss Alps.
Enjoy a delicious lunch at the restaurant located at Harder Kulm, featuring local Swiss cuisine and stunning panoramic views.
Stroll through the charming streets of Interlaken, where you can find local shops selling souvenirs and Crash Landing on You merchandise. Don't miss the beautiful parks and lakeside views.
Take a short trip to Lake Thun, where you can relax by the water or take a boat ride. The serene atmosphere is perfect for unwinding after a day of adventure.
Savor a hearty Swiss dinner at Restaurant Taverne, known for its cozy atmosphere and traditional dishes. A great way to end your day in Interlaken.
Settle into your comfortable accommodation at Hotel Interlaken, where you can relax and recharge for the next day's adventures.
Start your day with a hearty breakfast at Café de Paris, known for its delicious pastries and coffee. Enjoy the cozy atmosphere as you fuel up for a day of exploration.

Take the funicular from Interlaken to Harder Kulm, where you can enjoy breathtaking views of the Jungfrau region. The panoramic terrace offers a stunning backdrop for family photos and a chance to appreciate the beauty of the Swiss Alps.
Enjoy a delightful lunch at the restaurant on Harder Kulm, featuring local Swiss dishes and a fantastic view. Don't miss the chance to try the Rösti, a Swiss potato specialty.
After descending from Harder Kulm, take a scenic boat ride on Lake Thun. The crystal-clear waters and surrounding mountains create a perfect setting for relaxation and family bonding.
Once you reach Thun, visit the historic Thun Castle. Explore its museum and enjoy the panoramic views of the city and the lake from the castle grounds.

activities.activity: Dinner at Restaurant zum Alten Schloss
activities.description: Savor a delicious dinner at Restaurant zum Alten Schloss, known for its traditional Swiss cuisine. The cozy ambiance and local specialties make it a great choice for families.
After a fulfilling day, take the train back to Interlaken. Enjoy the scenic views along the way as you reflect on the day's adventures with your family.

days.title: Travel to Geneva and Cultural Exploration

transit.memo: Enjoy the scenic train ride through the Swiss Alps.

activities.description: Savor a delicious lunch at this charming café known for its fresh seafood and local specialties. It's a great spot to relax and recharge after your journey.

Wander through the cobbled streets of Geneva's Old Town, where you can admire the stunning St. Pierre Cathedral and the historic Maison Tavel, the oldest house in Geneva. Don't forget to stop by the local shops for some unique souvenirs!
Marvel at the iconic Jet d'Eau, one of Geneva's most famous landmarks. This impressive water fountain shoots water 140 meters into the air and is a perfect photo opportunity.
Take a leisurely walk along the shores of Lake Geneva, enjoying the beautiful views of the water and the surrounding mountains. It's a perfect way to unwind and soak in the serene atmosphere.
Indulge in a delightful dinner at Les Armures, a restaurant known for its traditional Swiss cuisine. Try the fondue or raclette for an authentic Swiss experience!

days.title: Day Trip to Montreux and Chillon Castle

transit.memo: Enjoy the scenic train ride along Lake Geneva.

activities.description: Explore the stunning Chillon Castle, a historic fortress on the shores of Lake Geneva. Wander through its medieval halls and enjoy breathtaking views of the lake and mountains.
Savor a delicious lunch at this charming café, known for its local Swiss dishes and cozy atmosphere. Don't miss their fondue, a true Swiss classic!
Stroll along the beautiful lakeside promenade of Montreux, lined with flowers and sculptures. Take in the fresh air and stunning views of the Alps.
Pay homage to the legendary Queen frontman with a visit to the iconic Freddie Mercury statue located on the lakeside. A perfect photo opportunity!

activities.activity: Shopping for Crash Landing on You Merchandise
activities.description: Explore local shops in Montreux for exclusive Crash Landing on You merchandise and souvenirs. A great chance to find unique items related to your favorite show!
Enjoy a delightful dinner at this restaurant known for its traditional Swiss cuisine. The cozy ambiance and delicious food make it a perfect end to your day.
Take the train back to Geneva, reflecting on a wonderful day filled with culture and history.

transit.memo: Enjoy the scenic train ride through the Swiss countryside.

activities.description: Explore the vibrant shopping district of Zurich, where you can find a variety of shops, including those selling 'Crash Landing on You' merchandise. Don't miss the charming boutiques and local crafts that reflect Swiss culture.

Savor traditional Swiss cuisine at Zeughauskeller, a historic restaurant known for its hearty dishes like Zürcher Geschnetzeltes (sliced veal in cream sauce). The atmosphere is lively and perfect for families.
Dive into Switzerland's rich history at the Swiss National Museum. The exhibits showcase everything from ancient artifacts to modern Swiss culture, making it a great educational stop for the family.
Take a break at the famous Café Sprüngli, known for its delicious Luxemburgerli macarons and rich hot chocolate. It's a perfect spot to relax and indulge before your departure.
Before heading to the train station, take some time for last-minute shopping. Look for unique Swiss souvenirs or 'Crash Landing on You' themed items to bring back home.
